sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100368" key="suneranisto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνερᾰν-ιστός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n100368.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who is contributed</tr_> (but does not contribute) to a picnic, of a parasite, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0437.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crobyl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl> (Pors. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">συνερανιστής</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
